title: Un Dia Completo de Macros Perfecto
setting: Dark premium kitchen and dining area with consistent warm side lighting, black matte surfaces, coral accent lights, same overhead food photography angle throughout, lifestyle aesthetic

scenes.prompt: Sunrise through kitchen window, dark premium countertop with meal prep containers, warm golden hour light with coral accents, cinematic food photography, 9:16 vertical
scenes.text: Un dia completo de macros perfecto
scenes.voiceover: Un dia completo de comidas, perfectamente trackeado. Mira lo facil que es.

scenes.prompt: Beautiful overhead shot of overnight oats with berries and nuts on dark slate, phone scanning food with AI interface glowing, morning light, 9:16 vertical
scenes.voiceover: Desayuno. Overnight oats con yogur griego, frutos rojos y almendras. Una foto. 480 calorias, 35 gramos de proteina. Listo en 3 segundos.

scenes.prompt: Stylish lunch bowl with grilled chicken, rice, avocado on dark background, macro overlay graphics floating, warm lighting with violet accents, 9:16 vertical
scenes.voiceover: Comida. Bowl de pollo con arroz y aguacate. La IA clava las porciones. 620 calorias, 45 gramos de proteina.

scenes.prompt: Dramatic shot of protein shake and banana on dark marble, gym bag in background, moody violet and coral lighting, fitness lifestyle, 9:16 vertical
scenes.voiceover: Snack post-entreno. Batido de proteina y un platano. 280 calorias, 30 gramos de proteina. Tu total diario actualizandose en tiempo real.

scenes.prompt: Elegant dinner plate with salmon, sweet potato, greens on dark background, app showing completed daily macros with green checkmarks, warm coral glow, 9:16 vertical
scenes.voiceover: Cena. Salmon con boniato y verduras. 580 calorias, 40 gramos de proteina. Dia completado. Todos los macros cumplidos.

scenes.prompt: Phone screen showing daily macro summary all green, confetti animation, dark premium UI with violet and coral, celebration mood, 9:16 vertical
scenes.voiceover: 1960 calorias, 150 gramos de proteina. Cuatro fotos. Cero adivinanzas. Prueba Cals2Gains gratis 7 dias.
